_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP, DNS resolution, HTTP/HTTPS protocols, firewall and security group configurations, load balancing, and how network architecture affects data pipeline design and performance.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-K-007 (OP, cosine: 0.422), AI-K-020 (AI, cosine: 0.421).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.471). Shared vocabulary: [fundamentals, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [telecommunications] vs WIDAI-only terms [affects, architecture, balancing, configurations, data, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.886 (P=0.948, R=0.831). P exceeds R by 0.116 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 31 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.1%, N:76.6%, C:23.3%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of telecommunications fundamentals." vs "Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP," — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.455 ≈ STS 0.471 (gap 0.016). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [fundamentals, knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.7%. Shared tokens: [fundamentals, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [telecommunications]. WIDAI-only: [affects, architecture, balancing, configurations, data, design].
